description_long: This is a double-ended open wrench, commonly used for tightening or loosening nuts and bolts. The tool is made of metallic material, likely steel, and features two U-shaped open jaws at either end, each sized differently for versatility. The central shaft is straight and slightly tapered, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish and no visible grip pattern. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible rust, wear, or branding. The wrench is compact and lightweight, suitable for hand use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings. Its utilitarian design is typical of standard hand tools found in urban environments.
description: A metallic double-ended open wrench with two U-shaped jaws and a smooth, clean finish. The tool is compact, sturdy, and shows no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing both open jaws and the full length of the wrench, highlighting the symmetrical design and smooth shaft.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the wrench, with both jaws aligned and the shaft appearing as a narrow strip.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both open jaws and the straight shaft, with no additional markings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the alignment of the jaws, mirroring view 1.
